Metadata.description: Predict the 2026 FIFA World Cup bracket, share your picks, and export a shareable PNG.
Metadata.title: 2026 BRACKET

EntryMetadata.description: Public 2026 World Cup prediction — predicted winner: {winner}. Complete your bracket and compete for prizes.
EntryMetadata.title: Entry {id} | Bracket FIFA 26

EntryNotFound.body: There is no saved prediction for that ID, or the link is wrong. Check the ID or complete your own bracket.
EntryNotFound.title: Entry not found

EntryPublic.ctaBracketHint: Complete your prediction and submit it to enter the prize draw.
EntryPublic.shareHint: When you share only the link to this page, many social apps will show your bracket card automatically.
EntryPublic.subtitle: Entry ID: {id}
EntryPublic.title: Public prediction

WelcomeMetadata.description: Welcome to the 2026 FIFA World Cup bracket predictor by SierraLabs.
WelcomeMetadata.title: Welcome | 2026 BRACKET

knockout.r16: Round of 16 — pick the winner of each match
knockout.r32: Round of 32 — pick the winner of each match

Bracket.bracketCompleteLine1: Fill in the form on the right and tap
Bracket.bracketCompleteLine2: to save and view your summary.
Bracket.groupStepLockedOtherHint: Use the dots above to jump to groups you still need to finish.
Bracket.hintR16: Pick a winner in all 8 matches to continue.
Bracket.hintR32: Pick a winner in all 16 matches to continue.
Bracket.hintQf: Pick a winner in all 4 matches.
Bracket.hintSf: Pick a winner in both semi-finals.
Bracket.hintThirdPick: Pick the winner of the third-place match.
Bracket.sidebarLockedBody: Complete every bracket stage through third place. Then you can enter your details and finish.

KnockoutRound.knockoutStepLockedHint: Use the dots above to jump to matches you still need to complete.
KnockoutRound.knockoutStepLockedRound: Complete every match in this round

Registration.title: Register prediction
Registration.footerHint: Complete the bracket (through third place) and your contact details to submit.
Registration.scoringBody: 10 points per correct winner, 25 for correct score, and 50 for the exact bracket path.
Registration.errorGeneric: Could not reach the server. Please try again.

Success.anotherHint: A new entry ID will be generated when you submit another prediction.
Success.challengeBody: The buttons on the left give you a PNG for social posts and a ready-to-paste block with your public link (rich preview of your card) plus the link to the app.
Success.copyEntryLinkButton: Copy your entry link + caption for social
Success.shareExportError: Could not generate the image. Try again.
Success.shareImageStep1: Download the PNG (1200×630). After the download, when the browser allows it, we copy a message with links for you to paste next to the image.
Success.shareImageStep2: Open the app where your audience lives and start a story, post, or status; attach the image from your gallery.
Success.shareImageStep3: Paste that text or what you copied with "Copy link…"; add your entry ID or a hook if you like. Invite people to complete the bracket on Bracket FIFA 26 and join the prize draw.
Success.subtitle: Your prediction has been registered for the 2026 World Cup Final prize draw.
Success.winnersNote: Winners will be announced on July 20th, 2026 via registered email.
